tagline: EdTech ecosystem reimagining primary education experiences

solutionOverview.title: Innovative Primary Education Platform
solutionOverview.summary: EduSentia combines gamification and AI to help primary teachers create engaging, personalized lessons aligned with the 2018 General Education Program.
details: Support teachers in designing interactive lessons quickly and effectively.
Boost student engagement through missions, challenges, and educational games.
Ensure digital learning materials are accurate and aligned with primary goals.

revenueTarget: Break-even after 24 months, target 3,000 teachers in year one.

footer.impactText: Teach funnier, learn deeper - Building the future with EduSentia!

modal.pasteLinkLabel: Paste a link to generate QR automatically

problemItems.title: Pressure to innovate primary teaching methods
problemItems.summary: Teachers struggle to shift toward competency-based teaching required by the 2018 education program.
details: Lack of tools to support designing experiential learning activities.
Time-consuming pressure to create engaging digital lesson plans.
Difficulty in personalizing learning paths for every student.

problemItems.title: Students easily distracted, lack of engagement
problemItems.summary: Traditional lecture methods no longer suit the information processing style of modern primary students.
details: Dry textbook content lacking interactivity and visual appeal.
Few opportunities for students to actively participate in knowledge creation.
Retention and deep understanding drop without cognitive stimuli.

problemItems.title: Lack of creative tools for teachers
problemItems.summary: Many existing platforms only provide static materials without mechanisms for teachers to build gamified content.
details: Existing tools require high tech skills, limiting widespread adoption.
Fragmented digital assets not well-linked to classroom activities.
Lack of real-time learning progress assessment systems.

problemItems.title: Gap between theory and real-world application
problemItems.summary: Primary students need vivid real-world examples to understand and remember knowledge rather than pure theory.
details: Lack of realistic simulation scenarios for skill practice.
Difficulty in linking lessons to cultural values and daily life.
Learning experiences limited within traditional classroom spaces.
Finish Minimum Viable Product with core primary education features.
Internal testing with a core group of ~50 teachers.
Evaluate system stability and lesson gamification mechanics.
Deploy pilot at 5 partner primary schools in Hanoi.
Scale of ~600 students and 100 teachers involved.
Optimize digital content based on real classroom feedback.
Integrate AI assistant for lesson planning and student Q&A.
Test Augmented Reality (AR) in science-themed lessons.
Upgrade personalized learning progress reporting systems.
Launch the official EduSentia version across platforms.
Wide-scale media campaign reaching the primary teacher community.
Establish B2B partnerships with major primary education systems.
Expand services for parents and students for home self-learning.
Build a creative teacher community sharing materials on the platform.
Organize nationwide digital lesson design competitions.
Reach break-even through optimized operations and infrastructure.
Stable revenue from Freemium model and school licensing.
Expand strategic partnerships in key provinces and cities.
Become the most popular primary teaching support platform in Vietnam.
Achieve accumulated revenue goals exceeding expectations.
Launch international EduSentia projects with multilingual content.

valuePropositionItems.title: Creative Teaching Ecosystem
valuePropositionItems.summary: Comprehensive toolset helping teachers easily design vivid image, video lessons and engaging educational games.
details: Integrated AI supports automatic creation of lesson images and videos based on content.
Design professional educational games and interactive quizzes without coding skills.
Huge digital library of assets aligned with the latest general education curriculum.

valuePropositionItems.title: Smart Management & Assignment
valuePropositionItems.summary: Optimize the entire assignment workflow, automatically track progress and grade exercises, saving maximum prep time.
details: Smart classroom management system automating the tracking of each student's learning journey.
Assign tasks as gamified missions to boost student motivation and engagement.
Full automation of grading and gap analysis to provide timely pedagogical interventions.

valuePropositionItems.title: Dual AI Assistant for T&S
valuePropositionItems.summary: Comprehensive AI companion optimizing teaching efficiency and creating interactive journeys with smart, context-aware responses based on the lesson.
details: For Teachers: Smart lesson planning, automated digital asset creation, and progress analytics by lesson topic.
For Students: Instant Q&A via virtual characters based on game/lesson context, and guided discovery missions.
Deep AI understanding of lesson content provides accurate suggestions, sparking passion for proactive exploration.

businessModelItems.title: Target Customers
details: Focus on solving teacher pain points in innovating instruction.
Expand to support parents in accompanying children's self-learning.
Provide solutions for orgs looking to digitize teaching programs.

businessModelItems.title: Revenue Streams
details: Freemium model with premium features for teachers/schools.
Monetize specialized deep-dive learning content by topic.
Deployment and professional training fees for educational units.

businessModelItems.title: Cost Structure
details: Prioritize investment in AI tech and smooth user experiences.
Content budget for rich assets and professional review.
Costs for building teacher communities and end-user support.

businessModelItems.title: Key Partners
details: Partner with authorities to ensure legality and expertise.
Connect with experts to update new educational trends.
Build a core teacher network for natural product expansion.

solutionFeatureItems.title: Gamified Lesson
solutionFeatureItems.summary: Turn every lesson into an exciting exploration game with challenges.
details: Rewards and badges system to encourage learning spirit.
Multimedia missions keep students from getting bored.
Direct interaction helps teachers gauge class understanding.

solutionFeatureItems.title: AI Pedagogical
solutionFeatureItems.summary: Dual AI assistants helping teachers teach effectively and students learn proactively via context.
details: For Teachers: Automate lesson planning and digital asset creation in seconds.
For Students: Instant Q&A based on lesson and game context via virtual characters.
Smart analytics system to track progress and provide tailored learning suggestions.

solutionFeatureItems.title: Digital Content Library
solutionFeatureItems.summary: Lessons, exercises, and projects aligned with the new program.
details: Diverse resources from Math, Vietnamese to Life Skills.
Content constantly updated to 2018 program standards.
Allow teachers to customize content for specific class needs.

solutionFeatureItems.title: Lesson Creation System (Game CMS)
solutionFeatureItems.summary: Where teachers share and co-build excellent digital lessons.
details: Integrated easy-to-use lesson editor (like PowerPoint).
Contribution recognition and copyright protection for teachers.
Professional support network from colleagues nationwide.

qrItems.label: APP(Android)
qrItems.title: Android App QR
qrItems.summary: Scan to experience the EduSentia app on Android devices.
qrItems.destination: App download and feature demo page
details: Use your camera to open the download link.
Recommended for Android devices for direct installation.
Experience educational games and AI assistant on mobile.

qrItems.label: WEBSITE
qrItems.title: Website Experience QR
qrItems.summary: Links to the EduSentia homepage to explore teaching features.
details: Perfect for teachers to get an overview of the solution.
Access sample lessons and tutorial videos.
Register for a free Pro trial for teachers.

qrItems.label: FANPAGE
qrItems.title: SEN Fanpage QR
qrItems.summary: This QR links to the official SEN fanpage on Facebook.
details: Scan to open the fanpage directly in browser or Facebook app.
Ideal for following the latest project updates.
Can be used in posters, slides, and marketing materials.
